**Clinical Reasoning:** Tocilizumab is listed explicitly as a biologic DMARD in the provided evidence under "Disease-Modifying Antirheumatic Drugs (DMARD)" classification, alongside other well-known biologics such as infliximab, adalimumab, and rituximab. It targets a specific immune pathway (IL-6 receptor blockade) and is included in monitoring guidelines for DMARD-treated patients, further supporting its status as a disease-modifying agent.
